recipe.title: Arancini mozza, riz & petits pois

ingredients.name: parmesan
ingredients.note: in pieces, grated before mixing into risotto

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.note: for sweating shallots and coating rice

ingredients.name: mozzarella
ingredients.note: cut into cubes for the center

steps.text: Grate the parmesan finely and reserve.
steps.visualCue: pale parmesan turns into fine snowy shavings
steps.runwayRisk: Low if shown as a short texture insert rather than a machine action.

steps.text: Chop the echalotes and scrape them down.
steps.visualCue: small wet shallot pieces gather against the bowl or board
steps.runwayRisk: Avoid appliance-specific controls; show chopped shallots landing in pan.

steps.text: Add butter and sweat the shallots.
steps.visualCue: butter cubes melt into glossy foam around shallot pieces
steps.runwayRisk: Induction should not show flame or glowing burner.

steps.text: Add risotto rice and toast briefly.
steps.visualCue: rice pearls become glossy and semi-translucent at the edge
steps.textureCue: slick rice grains clicking through butter
steps.runwayRisk: Keep one visible stirring action, not chaotic tool motion.

steps.text: Pour in white wine and cook briefly.
steps.visualCue: wine hisses and releases a small vapor cloud over glossy rice
steps.runwayRisk: Do not over-emphasize alcohol flame; no fire.

steps.text: Add vegetable stock, salt, and pepper, scrape the base, then cook until creamy.
steps.visualCue: stock floods rice, then hard cut to thick creamy risotto pulling away from spatula
steps.textureCue: starchy glossy grains suspended in creamy sauce
steps.runwayRisk: Long absorption should be compressed with hard cuts and state references.

steps.text: Transfer risotto to a plate, mix in parmesan, parsley, and peas, then cool.
steps.visualCue: green peas and parsley streak through pale risotto as parmesan melts
steps.textureCue: creamy rice becoming matte enough to shape
steps.runwayRisk: Cooling is invisible; use a spread-out sheet and a later firmer state.

steps.text: Form 6 cm balls, open a center well, add a mozzarella cube, and close.
steps.visualCue: hands press a rice cup around a white mozzarella cube and seal it into a sphere
steps.textureCue: sticky rice shell around firm cheese cube
steps.runwayRisk: The filled sphere geometry needs a state reference so the model keeps the filling inside.

steps.text: Coat each ball in flour, egg, breadcrumbs, then egg and breadcrumbs again.
steps.visualCue: white flour dust, yellow egg gloss, and coarse crumb armor build in layers
steps.textureCue: dry dust to wet gloss to rough breadcrumb crust
steps.runwayRisk: Multiple stations can confuse continuity; show one ball moving station by station.

steps.text: Fry batches in 180-190 C oil for 3-4 minutes, drain, and serve hot.
steps.visualCue: furious bubbles thin out as the shell turns golden, then steam escapes when opened
steps.textureCue: crisp golden crust, creamy rice, molten mozzarella
steps.runwayRisk: Oil bubbles can obscure the food; require visible safe lowering with hands/tools and hard cuts.

assumptions: The Thermomix-specific appliance actions are translated into visible pan and countertop actions for video clarity.
The final arancini are round, about 6 cm wide, with visible peas in the rice and a central mozzarella core.
A young leaf salad is optional serving context and should not distract from the arancini.
The uploaded final-dish photo can guide the golden crumb color, bowl stack, and cut-open mozzarella reveal.
criticalTransformations: Risotto rice changes from dry opaque grains to glossy toasted grains.
Stock absorption turns loose liquid rice into creamy starchy risotto.
Hot risotto with parmesan, peas, and parsley must cool into a moldable matte mass.
A mozzarella cube is sealed inside a rice sphere without showing exposed filling before frying.
Double breading changes a sticky rice ball into a rough, dry breadcrumb-coated shell.
Frying changes pale breadcrumb coating into a crisp golden crust while the mozzarella center melts.
Opening a hot arancino reveals creamy rice, green peas, steam, and soft mozzarella.
visualTextureOpportunities: Golden breadcrumb crust breaking into small crisp crumbs.
Mozzarella stretching from a cut-open arancino.
Green peas dotting creamy rice against the white cheese center.
Risotto rice pearls turning glossy in the pan.
Wine hitting hot rice with a brief vapor hiss.
Parmesan snow melting into the hot rice.
Flour dust, egg shine, and coarse breadcrumb texture in sequence.
Oil bubbles racing around the arancini during frying.
Final warm arancini piled in a rustic bowl beside fresh green leaves.
possibleHooks: Open on a crisp arancino cracking to reveal molten mozzarella and peas.
Open on breadcrumbs erupting into bubbles as a pale ball enters hot oil.
Open on a double-breaded ball rolling through coarse crumbs before a hard cut to golden fried crust.
Open on a spoon nudging a stack of golden arancini before a cut-open payoff.
Open on a close macro cheese pull from the first bite, then rewind into shaping.
